name: tabula-mcp
description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Turn Markdown created in Claude or local files into shared Tabula.md workspaces. Claude can start or join encrypted live sessions, list, read, search, edit, organize, and delete Markdown files, export fixed encrypted copies, and import a #json copy for local materialization. Room and copy keys stay in URL fragments; relays and snapshot storage receive encrypted data.

tools.name: tabula_start_session
tools.description: Start an encrypted live Tabula session from one or more Markdown files.

tools.name: tabula_join_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted live Tabula session from a private #room URL.

tools.name: tabula_list_files
tools.description: List Markdown files and folders in a live session.

tools.name: tabula_read_files
tools.description: Read one or more Markdown files and their current revisions.

tools.name: tabula_search_files
tools.description: Search Markdown paths and contents with line-numbered excerpts.

tools.name: tabula_write_files
tools.description: Create or replace one or more Markdown files and their folders in one live session transaction.

tools.name: tabula_edit_file
tools.description: Apply exact, revision-guarded replacements to one Markdown file.

tools.name: tabula_create_directory
tools.description: Create a directory and any missing parent directories in a live session.

tools.name: tabula_move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory in a live session.

tools.name: tabula_delete_path
tools.description: Delete a revision-guarded file or an explicitly recursive directory path.

tools.name: tabula_import_copy
tools.description: Decrypt a fixed #json copy into relative Markdown paths and contents for local materialization.

tools.name: tabula_export_copy
tools.description: Create an encrypted fixed #json copy from Markdown files or a live session.
